brand_identity.name: İbed
brand_identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Luxury, Bioluminescent Accents, Glassmorphism

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and product names. Tight tracking (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, specifications, and navigation. Normal tracking.

usage_rules.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for backgrounds (Deep Navy -> Black). NO linear gradients for text.
usage_rules.glows: Use box-shadow for glowing effects on active states: shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(78,205,196,0.3)].

buttons.primary: bg-[#4ecdc4] text-[#020617] hover:bg-[#2dd4bf] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(78,205,196,0.4)] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/50 border border-white/5 hover:border-[#4ecdc4]/30 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature: p-8 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 to-slate-950 border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-all

navigation.bar: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-5xl z-50 rounded-full bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between shadow-2xl

inputs.field: bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600 focus:border-[#4ecdc4] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4ecdc4] outline-none transition-all

motion.principles: Smooth, Fluid, Dream-like. Avoid sharp/jerky movements.

home.hero: Full screen immersive. Dark overlay (bg-black/40). Headline centered or bottom-left. 'Smart Bed' glowing text.
home.features: Bento grid layout showing 3 key features: Comfort, Technology, Durability.

products.layout: Sidebar filter (sticky) + Grid content. Cards should focus on image quality. Hover reveals specs.

product_detail.layout: Split screen. Left: Sticky Product Image. Right: Scrollable details (Specs, Story, Warranty).
product_detail.visuals: Use close-up textures to show quality.

contact.layout: Minimalist form on glass card. Map overlay with custom dark theme styles.

universal_guidelines: Implement a custom cursor (optional) - a small glowing dot.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use tinted blacks (#020617).
Mobile First: Stack grids to single column on mobile.
Use React Icons (Lucide) for UI elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow these guidelines strictly. The site must feel like a premium tech product (like a high-end speaker or electric car site), not a traditional furniture store. Prioritize atmosphere and smooth interactions.
